hooks.command: mkdir -p ~/.claude; MARKER='# Instruções Globais — jfelippebethlem@gmail.com'; if [ ! -f ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md ]; then cp "$(pwd)/.claude/global_preferences.md" ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md; elif ! grep -qF "$MARKER" ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; then printf '\n' >> ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md && cat "$(pwd)/.claude/global_preferences.md" >> ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md; fi 2>/dev/null || true
